design.targetAudience: Взрослый JavaScript/frontend-разработчик с локализованным пробелом в values/references и immutable state updates.
design.purpose: Один bounded learning sequence от shared identity и shallow copy к рабочему UI-state update.
prerequisites: Базовый синтаксис JavaScript, объекты, массивы и функции
learningOutcomes: Трассировать общую идентичность объектов и shallow-copy boundaries
Копировать только изменённый путь без мутации входа
Планировать и реализовывать вложенный UI-state update с edge cases
design.sourcePolicy: TC39, MDN и официальная React documentation; вторичные источники не использованы.
design.expectedRole: DRAFT acquisition, consolidation and transfer content; не calibration и не approved assessment.

schemaAndGraph.result: content:validate passed; 2 topics, 10 tasks, 0 assessments, 3 sequences

referenceCode.result: 4 CODE reference implementations passed 10 visible/hidden test cases

predictOutput.result: 3 PREDICT_OUTPUT snippets matched their versioned expected output

sourceUrls.result: 7 unique canonical sources resolved; 4 opened directly, 3 locale/anchor forms were verified through their official resolved MDN/TC39 targets after local network timeout

databaseDiff.result: 1 shared Track and 2 shared Topics reuse existing ownership; zero conflicts; 4 content items, 10 tasks and 3 sequences planned for create

theoryLength.result: Canonical note is 351 whitespace-delimited words; the complete four-item theory module is 618

findings: Нужны human pedagogical review, rendered UI dry run и timing check.
resolvedFindings: Schema, sources and 300–700 word canonical explanation bound checked.

findings: Нужно подтвердить, что worked example достаточно направляет, но не раскрывает ответы заданий.
resolvedFindings: Example identifiers and structure differ from all assessed examples.
Contrast sibling and shared family are explicit in payload.

findings: Нужна human-проверка remediation wording и cognitive load.
resolvedFindings: Common mistake does not contain an exact later-task solution.

findings: Нужен human solve и UI output-format check.
resolvedFindings: Reference output executed and matched expected output.

findings: Human reviewer должен подтвердить rubric для свободного ответа.
resolvedFindings: Prompt does not require terminology and does not fabricate deterministic grading.

findings: Нужен human solve и проверка predict-before-reveal UX.
resolvedFindings: Reference output executed on a new example and matched expected output.

findings: Human reviewer должен проверить ambiguity, partial-credit rubric и единственный hint.
resolvedFindings: Prompt states mutation symptom and required edge case without embedding corrected code.

findings: Нужны human solve и оценка объёма guided scaffolding.
resolvedFindings: Reference implementation passed 1 visible and 1 hidden test; hint is bounded.

findings: Нужны human solve, UI runner dry run и timing check.
resolvedFindings: No hints; reference implementation passed 1 visible and 2 hidden tests.

findings: Нужно подтвердить delayed-review timing и manual explanation rubric.
resolvedFindings: Reference output executed and matched expected output; task has no hint.

findings: Нужны human solve и timing check для consolidation.
resolvedFindings: No hints; reference implementation passed visible and hidden tests.

findings: Human reviewer должен проверить work-like realism и transfer rubric.
resolvedFindings: Plan prompt covers changed/preserved references, missing target and trade-off without code leakage.

findings: Нужны human solve, runner UI dry run и timing check.
resolvedFindings: No hints; reference implementation passed 1 visible and 2 hidden tests including identity contracts.

findings: Нужен полный human sequence dry run и проверка 30-minute estimate.
resolvedFindings: All 8 exact-version refs, completion bounds and phase fit passed validation.
Completion requires one final no-help success from the pure PREDICT_OUTPUT task; mixed CODE evaluations remain partial until their unsupported rubric dimensions are reviewed.

findings: Нужно проверить delayed scheduling и 8-minute estimate в приложении.
resolvedFindings: Both exact-version no-help task refs and completion bounds passed validation.

findings: Нужен end-to-end human flow recommendation → attempt → evidence → capability update.
resolvedFindings: Plan and implementation refs, phase and completion bounds passed validation.
